mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, is_read, read_time, biz_ref_type, biz_ref_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification ( user_id, type, title, content, is_read, read_time, biz_ref_type, biz_ref_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isRead,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{readTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{bizRefType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizRefId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
